prompt: I have a rough draft of an attack chain for PowerShell-based C2 via DNS tunneling. Can you review it, fill in missing sections, and improve the detection logic?

assertions.name: has_all_8_sections
assertions.description: Document now contains all required sections including the previously missing Detection Opportunities, Data Sources & Log Fields, and Pseudocode Queries

assertions.name: mitre_id_corrected
assertions.description: MITRE mapping now uses T1071.004 (DNS sub-technique) instead of just T1071

assertions.name: fidelity_ratings_present
assertions.description: At least one detection method is labeled with High, Medium, or Low fidelity

assertions.name: attack_steps_expanded
assertions.description: Attack Steps section has more than the original 3 bullet points, ideally with PowerShell code examples

assertions.name: pseudocode_queries_added
assertions.description: A Pseudocode Queries section exists and contains at least one detection query
